blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,317 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
